programme.desc: Jenna, una ex bailarina profesional, usa el ballet para ayudar a un jugador de Hockey a volver a las pistas de hielo. Protagonizan Alexa PenaVega y Luke Macfarlane.

programme.title: Navidad a la medida
programme.desc: Steven recluta a Gretchen, una coordinadora de vacaciones, para llevar la alegría navideña a su familia. Ninguno esperaba que el espíritu navideño los acercara más. Protagonizada por Alexa PenaVega y Jonathan Bennett.

programme.title: Beso de medianoche
programme.desc: Con solo una semana para planear el evento, una organizadora de fiestas debe contar con la ayuda de un extraño para organizar todo. Pero lo que no planeó fue enamorarse en el proceso.

programme.title: Amor en invierno
programme.desc: Ally, finalista de un programa de citas en televisión, debe regresar a su ciudad natal para una última cita con la persona menos esperada. Protagonizada por Italia Ricci, Chad Michael Murray, Jack Turner.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: Hoping for more privacy, Richie moves out of the Cunningham home to share an apartment with his brother and soon discovers it's not the paradise he expected.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: Richie's fears get the best of him while he's reading a book on abnormal psychology and it drives him to secretly see a psychiatrist.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: Hollywood comes to Jefferson High when Richie wins a dance date with a beautiful movie star in a school raffle.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: Richie lets fame go to his head when he takes a turn as a disc jockey at the local radio station.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: While in Chicago with their high school choir, Richie, Ralph, and Potsie sneak by their chaperons, wind up on the wrong side of an unsympathetic downtown nightclub owner, and win the sympathy of a kind-hearted cocktail waitress.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: The Cunningham family plans a quiet, old-fashioned family Christmas until Richie discovers Fonzie faces a lonely holiday.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mindy is dazed at the reality that she and Mork are the parents of Mearth -half-earthling/half-orkan with the body of a 50-year-old and the mind of an infant and feels lef t out when Mearth accepts Mork as his mommy.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mork buys Mearth a fortune in presents to assure his happiness, and when Mindy, fearing a spoiled child, orders that they be returned, their unusual child decides they don't love him anymore.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mearth hates his first day of school on planet Ork so much that Mork and Mindy accompany him back to Ork Prep, where Mork's ancient teacher - who looks like a child - is still sternly in charge.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mindy, already worried about losing her job at the television station, foresees disaster when Mork and Mearth accidentally transfer minds, forcing her to take Mearth in Mork’s body to meet the new boss.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Terror-stricken Mork believes the examiner assigned to give him a driving test is an incarnation of the devil, and careens along the test course in a spectacular tilted wheelie, with Mindy and Mearth in the car.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: All of Mork's Earth memory is zapped into thin air by vengeful Orson on Ork when Mork neglects his job of reporting back to his planet because of family responsibilities.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: The girls are happy to head out on their first plane trip ever, but their smiles are turned upside down when their pilot passes out. Leaving it up to one of them to take over the controls.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Shirley's new boyfriend asks Laverne out behind her back. This later leads to a fight between the two. Will they stop arguing long enough to see that their friendship is worth more than one man?

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: The girls shop in a toy store for a friend. Laverne sees a toy robot and plays with it. The robot blows a fuse though and attacks her. Leading the girls to sue the toy company - but the girls discover the law can be as unfeeling as that robot.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Dressed as Alice in Wonderland for a local children's play, Shirley ends up going to the hospital instead to get her appendix out. Her fear causes her to run and hide, so the gang must find her before her appendix fails her for good.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Two FBI agents use the girls' apartment to stake out criminal activity across the street. When the suspect gets outside their window the girls are shocked to see Carmine with him. Has Carmine gone bad or is there another explanation?

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Laverne and Shirley get reacquainted with Ms. Babish's mentally challenged daughter, Amy, who's visiting from her special school. Lenny meets Amy and immediately comes to like her, despite people's protests about what's best for Amy.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: It's New Years Eve 1959 and 1960 is shortly due. In the final hours, Laverne's date cancels, Shirley's sick, and Lenny and Squiggy have a special plan for midnight outside the apartment building. Will Laverne leave the '50s in tears or cheers?

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Shirley rescues a white horse. The owner wants to send it to the glue factory, but Shirley seeks him a happy home. She gets Edna in trouble with a health inspector for having him in the apartment. Will it be greener pastures for Buttercup?

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: All that glitters is Mork's gold when the Orkan learns how to make the precious metal from polyester, buys Mindy a 60-room mansion where she can stable her new horse and hires tennis star Tracy Austin as son Mearth's tennis coach.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mork is overjoyed that he and Mindy can finally let it all hang out when he meets Kalnik - an alien from Neptune who apparently is also married to an earthling and the four seem to have everything in common.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mindy lets Mork move into her apartment, much to the dispute of her father.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: When a reporter offers a reward for proof of alien life, Mork decides to turn himself in to pay back the McConnells.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mork meets Sergei, a Russian immigrant, and invites him to live with them. After Sergei refers to himself as 'an alien,' Mork becomes convinced that he himself has to register with the government as an alien.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mork can't afford to buy Christmas presents, so he makes strange, unique gifts for each of his closest friends.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: Richie is sick in bed with the flu and is bored with eating soup and doing crossword puzzles. But when his family leaves him alone in the house, pandemonium breaks loose when Fonzie, Potsie, Ralph, and a burglar join him.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Lou comes back from Dubai to spend time with the family. Ty and Amy discover where her father's rustled cattle are being pastured and the whole family rides out to bring them back.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Ty's travel buddies, Grant and Blair, return to Heartland, and Ty and Amy's relationship is put in jeopardy. Caleb and Ashley's relationship is in turmoil after finding out their marriage is not legal.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Tim decides to enter Lightning Dexter in a claiming race, despite Amy's objections. Amy and Ty's troubles are aggravated when Chase comes to town and offers to put in a bid on Dexter.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Jack resists taking a trip to France with Lisa while dealing with some old memories. Caleb asks Ty to be his best man but finds it harder to ask him to move out.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Amy finds herself overwhelmed after promising to de-sensitize three horses for the local police. Amy returns the last of Ty's things and he continues down his road of confusion.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: When famous Olympic trainer Stewart Forrest hires Amy to coach his Olympic hopeful daughter, Amy feels that he's pushing her and her horse too hard. Ty is concerned when Amy asks Chase for help again.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Bad publicity from Stewart Forrest's lawsuit against Amy has everyone at Heartland concerned. When Chase pulls his horses from training, Ty lends Amy his support and Lou does a little investigating.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Caleb's rodeo buddy Bryce returns from Afghanistan in a wheelchair and asks Amy to get his horse back into good condition so that he can sell it, but Amy would rather convince him to try riding again.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Tim and his girlfriend announce they are selling the ranch and moving to California, but one of Tim's old girlfriends comes back and claims that Tim is the father of her son.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Amy and Ty work through their trust issues as they train a pair of Clydesdales. A horse-crazed boy and his mom show up at Heartland and Tim learns about a son he never knew he had.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Amy meets a professional liberty horse trainer and is inspired to take her horsemanship to a new level. A leaky roof forces Amy and Ty to move into Ashley and Caleb's trailer.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Jack shanghais Tim, taking him to Moosejaw to confront his ex-girlfriend and son. Meanwhile, Amy is left to confront Janice about how to train the new racehorse.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Peter and Lou bring the baby back to Heartland and invite the in-laws to the naming ceremony. Scott drops by Ty's new place with a motorcycle requiring some work.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Amy works with a chuckwagon horse and discovers an impediment that could put the entire team in danger, so she changes the dynamics of a prominent chuckwagon family.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día uno
programme.desc: En este estreno de temporada de dos horas, doce chefs comienzan su viaje hacia el premio final: un puesto de chef ejecutivo en el recientemente inaugurado Red Rock Casino, Resort and Spa en Las Vegas.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día dos
programme.desc: Después de una desastrosa noche de apertura, ambos equipos aprenden la importancia del servicio en un restaurante: servir mesas.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día tres
programme.desc: Frustrado después de otro mediocre servicio en la cena, el chef Ramsay comparte algunas de sus experiencias dirigiendo un exitoso restaurante mientras prepara la competencia de la tercera noche.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día cuatro
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay pone fin a la batalla de los sexos y "Hell's Kitchen" abre nuevos caminos cuando los equipos cocinan para un grupo especialmente exigente: los niños.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día cinco
programme.desc: El quinto día comienza con el chef Ramsay dando una lección a los concursantes restantes sobre el arte del sabor culinario.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día seis
programme.desc: Los seis chefs restantes preparan sus platos originales, y los dos equipos diseñan sus menús para la cena de la noche.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Dia siete
programme.desc: Los chefs deben trabajar como equipo por primera vez. El premio de este desafío es un viaje con el chef Ramsay al Red Rock Casino, Resort and Spa.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día ocho
programme.desc: Con solo cuatro chefs restantes, la competencia se vuelve feroz. ¿Quién de ellos tiene lo que se necesita para ser el jefe de cocina del nuevo restaurante de Gordon Ramsay?

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día nueve
programme.desc: Los concursantes prueban el plato estrella del chef Ramsay y se les dan veinte minutos para reproducirlo. Las tensiones aumentan entre los chefs en medio de acusaciones de trampa.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día diez - Parte 1
programme.desc: Luego de una visita sorpresa de familiares, los concursantes restantes deberán diseñar sus propios restaurantes y jerarquías para el servicio final.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día diez - Parte 2
programme.desc: Desde el menú hasta la decoración, los dos finalistas deben demostrar su talento al chef Ramsay, ya que cada uno está a cargo de sus propios restaurantes.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El tiránico Chef Gordon Ramsay regresa por tercer verano para enseñar y torturar a posibles Chefs. El ganador recibirá un trabajo de Chef en el resort Green Valley Ranch de Nevada.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los dos equipos se enfrentan en un desafío de preparación de alimentos que recompensa a los ganadores por la oportunidad de pasar tiempo con el Chef Ramsay fuera de la cocina.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay ordena a los concursantes restantes que preparen el desayuno para los miembros del servicio visitantes. El equipo ganador tendrá tiempo libre y los perdedores tendrán el rol de patrullar la cocina.

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show
programme.desc: Drew's stomach causes problems in his relationship with Kate. Mimi must get an annulment from her ex-husband.

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show
programme.desc: Steve and Mimi get a morbid surprise on their wedding day - and it's Drew's fault.

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show
programme.desc: Drew expects a sexual adventure with Kate, but instead he scandalizes her grandparents.

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show
programme.desc: Drew writes an inspiring speech for an elderly board member, but the board member makes offensive jokes.

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show
programme.desc: Drew is finally allowed an assistant - too bad it's the incompetent Kate. Lewis crashes Oswald's car.

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show
programme.desc: Mimi is fired, but Drew's celebration ends after Steve and Mimi park their trailer in Drew's backyard.

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show
programme.desc: When Kate decides she's ready to have sex with Drew, he's thrilled, but Kate wishes Drew was more spontaneous.

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show
programme.desc: Kate worries Drew's ex-girlfriend wants to seduce him - and she may be right.

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show
programme.desc: Mr. Wick tempts Drew with a questionable scheme that could get them both promoted.

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show
programme.desc: Drew wants to sell the Buzz Beer company, but first he must convince his resistant business partners.

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show
programme.desc: Drew, Kate, Lewis, and Oswald become nauseated by alcohol. Drew and Kate are too busy to spend time together.

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show
programme.desc: Oswald receives a letter from a man who could be his son, but the young man looks more like Lewis than Oswald.

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show
programme.desc: When Mr. Wick returns from re-training, Mimi battles with Mr. Wick and Drew for the store manager job.

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show
programme.desc: Kate and Drew's dog Speedy vie for control of Drew, while Mimi and Steve attempt to conceive a child.

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show
programme.desc: Drew assembles a squad of misfits to challenge Mr. Wick's official store softball team.

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show
programme.desc: Drew and Kate plan a romantic night together, but Kate learns her ex-boyfriends feel she treated them poorly.

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show
programme.desc: In a surreal episode, the series stars compete to give award-winning performances in overly emotional scenes.

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show
programme.desc: Drew realizes he wants to marry Kate and buys an expensive engagement ring.

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show
programme.desc: Even though he's now engaged to Kate, Drew feels his life is pathetic thanks to his job at the cafeteria.

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show
programme.desc: Drew tries to inherit $10,000 by staging a phony wedding with Kate.

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show
programme.desc: Mimi wins Kate's stake in Buzz Beer during a poker game, and much to Drew's chagrin produces a lucrative idea.

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show
programme.desc: Drew and the cast are joined by performers from "Whose Line Is It Anyway?" for this live, improvised episode.

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show
programme.desc: Drew celebrates a potential Kate pregnancy, but Kate tells Drew she wants a career instead of children.

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show
programme.desc: Drew is prohibited from becoming a scout troup leader after his same-sex marriage to Mr. Wick.

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show
programme.desc: After Drew's relationship with Kate ends, Lewis and Oswald urge Drew to date again, which infuriates Kate.

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show
programme.desc: Drew tries to impress his new boss by performing at a fundraiser, but his terrible singing offends everyone.

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show
programme.desc: Lewis and Oswald create havoc at a beer convention with their Buzz Beer mascot - a beer-guzzling bear.

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show
programme.desc: After Drew goes on one date with a very pregnant woman, she assumes he'll become the baby's official father.

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show
programme.desc: When Mimi and Steve buy a house next to the Warsaw, Drew and the guys get drunk and urinate in Mimi's yard.

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show
programme.desc: Oswald's father gets Drew a job at his real estate office, but Drew discovers the office is running a scam.

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show
programme.desc: When Drew and Mr. Wick's domestic relationship sours, Drew ejects him from the house.

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show
programme.desc: After a car accident, Drew lies in a coma and enters a dream world.

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show
programme.desc: As Drew's spirit floats up to heaven, he meets the soul of his nephew, who's about to be born.

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show
programme.desc: Only Drew can help Mimi's baby stop crying, while Lewis believes he's going to die.

programme.title: The Drew Carey Show
programme.desc: When Drew's obituary is mistakenly printed in a newspaper, Drew realizes he hasn't achieved anything in life.

programme.title: The Enchanted Christmas Cake
programme.desc: When a high-end chef comes to town to film a Christmas special, local baker Gwen agrees to help handsome TV producer Gavin prepare for the shoot in hopes of regaining her Christmas spirit, which she lost when her grandma Lottie passed last year.

programme.title: The Christmas Trap
programme.desc: When a couple on the brink of divorce get stuck in an elevator on Christmas Eve, they realize where they went wrong in their relationship.

programme.title: Hot Chocolate Holiday
programme.desc: A coffee shop owner finds herself in competition with the handsome owner of a dessert shop whose hot chocolate tastes just like her grandmother's secret recipe.

programme.title: A Sweet Christmas Romance
programme.desc: When a food stylist returns home for Christmas, she learns that the elderly owner of her favorite childhood bakery is retiring and has started a contest to give the bakery away to whoever can re-create her famous 12 Days of Christmas recipes.

programme.title: The Christmas Snowman
programme.desc: A woman wakes to discover her handsome new neighbor is none other than the living embodiment of the snowman she built the day before.

programme.desc: A top chef falls for a handsome rival while on a holiday cooking getaway to regain her Christmas spirit.

programme.desc: The Ricardos and Mertzes, impatient with their egg selling business, decide that they must trade in their 500 chicks for 200 egg laying hens. However, after a couple of weeks, these hens don't yield many eggs at all.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy decides to take part in the fund-raising campaign of the Westport Historical Society and offers to get her husband and his band to perform for their kickoff function. There's only one hitch – Ricky refuses to do it.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy dreams of a night in New York City after spending six whole weeks in their new Connecticut home and it turns into a nightmare. Carefully hoarded tickets to a Broadway musical are supposed to take the Ricardos and the Mertzes to see the sold-out show.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ethel is jealous of Lucy's friendship with neighbor Betty Ramsey. Sensitive to this, Lucy decides that the three of them should have a nice lunch together. Although reticent at first, Ethel opens up to Betty upon hearing they are both from Albuquerque.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy must get vacationing Ricky out of her hair so she can do her housework. She and Ethel trick their husbands into building a brick barbecue on the Ricardo patio by first pretending to build it themselves.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and the Mertzes go with their neighbors, Ralph and Betty Ramsey, to the country club dance where a pretty visitor quickly convinces the men they are Romeos in disguise. They are each taken with Diana, the young beautiful cousin of a neighbor.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Suburbanite Lucy gets a green thumb and a competitive spirit. She has been raising tulips with a vengeance and wants to dethrone her neighbor Betty Ramsey for "Best Looking Garden" in the local garden club competition.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The town of Westport has commissioned a statue of a Minuteman to commemorate the Revolutionary War. The whole town is involved, from Fred who will serve as town crier to Ricky who will make the dedication speech.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: To celebrate the Mertzes' wedding anniversary, Fred and Ricky want to go to a prizefight, but the girls want to get dressed up and go to a nightclub. An argument ensues and Lucy threatens to find two other escorts if their husbands won't take them.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy decides Ricky's love is growing cold so she takes Ethel's advice she learned from a book, How to Keep the Honeymoon from Ending. Her attempt to dress up for breakfast doesn't yield any response from Ricky.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: One of the girls in Ricky's show quits, creating a vacancy which Lucy wants to fill. She goes down for an audition and can have the part provided she loses twelve ponds in four days to fit into the previous singer's size 12 outfit.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy is reading "The Mockingbird Murder Mystery" when Ethel reads her fortune and tells her death is near. Later she overhears a conversation between Ricky and his agent and she jumps to the wrong conclusion that he's trying to do away with her.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: When Ricky cuts off Lucy's allowance and charge accounts because of her careless spending, Lucy finds herself short of funds. Ethel has tickets to a radio quiz show that has a cash prize of $1,000.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Network television scouts are going to check out Ricky's band and Lucy tries to "get into the act" in order to be discovered as well. Of course Ricky will not hear of it.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy becomes interested in numerology and advises Ricky that it is a good day for him to make any deals he can. However, she soon realizes that she consulted the horoscope from yesterday's newspaper.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: When Ricky leaves his clothes around the living room, Lucy gets angry and divides the room in half so Ricky can be as messy as he likes - on his side!

programme.desc: El 31 de marzo de 2003, los bomberos fueron llamados a un incendio en una urbanización de Meyrargues, cerca de Aix-en-Provence.

programme.desc: El 18 de junio de 2011, Marie-Jeanne Meyer, de 17 años, se despidió de su hermana pequeña antes de salir para su trote diario en las alturas de Tournon en Ardèche.

programme.desc: A principios de los años ochenta, la decapitación de un joven afroamericano llevó al Departamento de Policía de Miami-Dade y al FBI a lo largo de un rastro de asesinatos.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En noviembre de 1994, cuando un vehículo blindado de Wells Fargo desapareció de un centro comercial de Glendale, Arizona, las autoridades locales y el FBI fueron de inmediato a recuperarlo, junto con la carga de casi un millón de dólares.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI

programme.desc: Peluzín adquiere una nueva mascota que revolucionará el vecindario. En tanto el Noruego y Gaspar intentan ayudar a el Lentejas a superar sus extrañas inclinaciones sexuales.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y el Noruego buscan nuevos horizontes a través de la creación de una fundación, mientras Peluzín cae en la cuenta de su soledad y sale a buscar amigos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.desc: Peluzín tiene éxito con un nuevo método de protesta, mientras El Noruego y Jony dan sus primeros pasos en la "cossa nostra

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin announces he's going to steal the betting takes at the Kentucky Derby, but the heist fails. However, it's all part of the plan. Lupin's main target is really the Metropolitan Bank's underground vault.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: After several divorces and a couple of deceased husbands, Jacqueline has amassed a fortune and a collection of impressive jewels. In a twist of fate, Lupin and Jacqueline become close... Too close for Jigen and Goemon's comfort…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: An illicit auction selling smuggled treasures is taking place. Lupin targets the auction. In the process, Lupin discovers the auctioneer is Cornelia, the woman he once loved who died saving his life…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin is reunited with Cornelia, a woman who died by her father's hands to save Lupin's life. However, Cornelia's memories of Lupin have been erased. Her father is Dr. Zel, a Nazi who has succeeded in resurrecting corpses and controlling them.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Fujiko discovers that the Holy Scripture for Immortality is hidden within the jungles of Thailand. However, Emmanuelle Poirot, a cold-hearted beauty, is after them too.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Phantoma Mark III, grandson of the mysterious master thief and disguise artist Phantoma, who terrorized Europe during his heyday, is plotting to take over the world…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The aging Inspector Hanshichi Mikawa, who failed to capture Lupin 10 years ago, is viewed as a nuisance by his peers at the downtown police station. Lupin has announced he'll be stealing the golden Kannon statuette.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang have stolen the "36 Views of Mt. Fuji," a famous series of 46 woodblock prints, from the exhibition hall. However, a gang calling itself the Shiranami Five challenges Lupin head-on by stealing one of the prints from him.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Goemon, siding with the Shiranami Five, challenges Lupin to a one-on-one duel. While Goemon keeps Lupin busy, the Shiranami Five steals the 36 Views, but one of its members, Kikuko Benten, betrays her gang and escapes with the loot.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: On a wild whim, Inspector Zenigata swipes a throwing coin owned by his great Edo-era ancestor, Heiji Zenigata while he's viewing the inside of an incredible new safe protected by Professor Hunter's super computer.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and Jigen are after the Aurora Droplet, a diamond adorning a prima ballerina's tiara. During the heist, Jigen is wounded and in a twist of fate, is saved by Monica, the prima ballerina.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: After shaking off Inspector Zenigata's pursuit, Lupin is stopped by a monstrously huge Fujiko on his way home! The giant Fujiko turns out to be an illusion created by Madame X. Lupin learns Madame X's hobby is collecting famous people.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Bandit leader Basara is determined to sniff out the location of the diamonds Lupin has hidden somewhere in India. Armed with his sinister invention, the Suicide Ray Gun, he tries to make Lupin talk, even trying his luck with a fake Fujiko.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Trouble is all but guaranteed when a crime boss and an arms merchant join hands. The two set their eyes on Goemen's sword, which can split a tank in half! After hiring Fujiko to steal it, they transform the sword into an invincible flying weapon of war.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Jigen and Gomen have sent a letter saying they are being held captive in a small but terrifying village. Lupin arrives in the village to rescue them, but Jigen and Goemon are acting oddly.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Don Kecchi, the wealthiest man in America, is terminally ill and has announced that he's donating his entire fortune to charity. However, Lupin steals Kecchi's money and shoots Fujiko right in front of Inspector Zenigata!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Margaret Tiffany, the owner of Tiffany's and a TV anchor, hires Lupin and his gang to rob her jewelry store on live TV. Initially, Lupin refuses, but ends up having to go through with it thanks to Fujiko's wild spending habits.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A princess of a small Silk Road country has been kidnapped. Lupin and his gang are persuaded to rescue Princess Yasmin in exchange for a stomach full of holy curry meant for the gods. However, the kidnapping was a trap to lure Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Here comes Beauty, the assassin hired by ICPO Headquarters to knock off Lupin! Overwhelmed by Beauty's powerful DumDum bullets, Lupin narrowly escapes with his life thanks to Jigen's quick thinking.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang head to the isolated country of Kimasan, after hearing the country possesses mountains of treasure. They sneak across the border but are quickly captured by Kinkaku and Ginkaku, the giants who rule the country.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Casino Paradise is an artificial island owned and operated by Domino, a casino tycoon. Domino decides to run for President and brags that with $500 million to spend, the only way he can lose is if Lupin steals his campaign funds!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Political fixer Pomade Jaws trusts no one, not even his wife Laura. He's stored the scandalous secrets of various world leaders inside a voice-activated safe.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin, Jigen and Goemon have turned themselves in to the FBI, but it's all part of the plan. Their real goal is to break out old man Clyde Barlow, who was once known as a genius bank robber, to get his help with their heist of the National Super Bank.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Isamu Kondo III, grandson of the leader of the Shinsengumi, hires Lupin and his gang to recover a golden cannon sunk by the Shogunate forces in the Tsugaru Strait. After much effort, the valuable golden cannon is finally recovered from the deep ocean.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Ellery Queen, the owner of the legendary sapphire called "The Eye of Solomon," is also the owner of a football team. Lupin, coming for the sapphire as announced, discovers Queen on the brink of death.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The 3rd Thieves Olympic is about to be held in Japan, and Lupin and Jigen are in it to win it! After winning the first and second Thieves Olympic, if they also win this year's getaway race, they'll become the first-ever Triple-Crown winners!

programme.title: Great Games

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Alan Partridge

programme.desc: Danni Washington, recorre el "edificio viviente" conocido como Bullit Cente.

programme.title: Congreso Internacional de Brujería
programme.desc: En 1975, Bogotá se convierte en sede del primer Congreso Internacional de Brujería, donde se reunien chamánes, sacerdotes del vudú, telepatas, alquimistas, regresionistas, hipnotistas y hasta un espacio para el aterrizaje de OVNIs.

programme.title: Diana: 7 días que conmocionaron al mundo
programme.desc: El 31 de agosto de 1997, la princesa Diana muere en un trágico accidente de auto. La serie revela los preparativos y las negociaciones que se llevaron a cabo mientras la monarquía y sus asesores luchaban por proteger a los príncipes William y Harry.

programme.title: Diana: 7 días que conmocionaron al mundo
programme.desc: La parte final se centra en los planes logísticos para el funeral de Diana y en el propio día de la mudanza, así como en entrevistas muy reveladoras con el mayordomo de Diana durante diez años, Paul Burrell, y su secretario privado, Patrick Jephson.

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Un vendedor despierta interés por sus discos de vinilo de Led Zeppelin, los que le suenan muy bien a Rick y a Chum. ¿Harán suficiente ruido estos álbumes como para pagar mucho por ellos?

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Un vendedor acude a los expertos del empeño para mostrarles un artículo utilizado en la película "Volver al futuro II". Rick se siente pasado de moda cuando llega a él un extraño calendario de 1900 de una empresa de químicos.

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Rick va a Washington D. C. a ver uno de los primeros Jeep, el cual fue fabricado para la Segunda Guerra Mundial. Aprovechando que está en D. C., visita una librería de tomos antiguos para ver un libro de alquimia.

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Este episodio de "El precio de la historia" levanta vuelo con una edición original de 1911 de la novela "Peter Pan": ¿la adquirirá Rick o preferirá gastarse sus recursos en un pedazo de metal de una aeronave?

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Rick ve una espada con pistola del siglo XVIII. ¿Le dará al blanco del trato o le saldrá el tiro por la culata? Llega a la escena un retrato del legendario actor de cine y teatro John Barrymore.

programme.title: Cazadores de ovnis
programme.desc: En 1956, se detectó un objeto sobre el Mar del Norte que se dirigía a la base de la RAF de Bentwaters, una base con armas nucleares. Dos cazas Venom hicieron contacto con el objeto, pero sus armas y sistemas eléctricos quedaron inutilizados.

programme.title: Archivos de ovni
programme.desc: Roswell evoca el caso de ovni más famoso en la historia de los Estados Unidos, atrayendo a los creyentes en una búsqueda interminable. ¿Podría Canadá tener uno verdadero, un caso de ovni con un rastro certificable?

programme.title: Estado paranormal
programme.desc: Estado paranormal viaja hasta el rancho de Gilliland en el estado de Washington, un semillero de actividad paranormal inexplicable que incluye posibles ovnis en el cielo y criaturas aladas en el bosque.

programme.title: Estado paranormal
programme.desc: La jubilada Carol Ann se mantiene despierta todas las noches grabando las voces de los muertos. ¿Está simplemente documentando o proporcionando un portal para las fuerzas oscuras ansiosas de cruzar?

programme.title: Linda Napolitano: la abducción alienígena del siglo
programme.desc: La abducción alienígena de Linda Napolitano en 1989 es el caso de abducción del siglo.

programme.title: Los testigos: encuentros con antiguos alienígenas
programme.desc: El contactado, el vidente y el abducido comparten experiencias similares y diferentes con seres de otras dimensiones, dejando una marca duradera de su presencia.

programme.title: Avistamientos masivos de extraterrestres: La verdad innegable
programme.desc: El documental analiza los avistamientos masivos de extraterrestres, cuestiona la fiabilidad de las explicaciones oficiales e identifica patrones comunes para una mayor investigación.

programme.title: Base de dulce: Los nuevos Illuminati
programme.desc: Dulce, Nuevo México, es un punto de acceso para fenómenos misteriosos y una supuesta colaboración militar secreta entre humanos y extraterrestres.

programme.title: Cazadores de ovnis II: cuentos del universo
programme.desc: Los ufólogos italianos exploran la evidencia alienígena en la historia y el folclore. ¿Hemos sido observados desde la antigüedad?

programme.title: Cazadores de ovnis: los ufólogos Italianos
programme.desc: Investigadores italianos exploran avistamientos masivos de ovnis, clipeología y testimonios reales, profundizando en la historia y los métodos de investigación de la ufología.

programme.title: Cíclope extraterrestre: El extraordinario caso de la Sagrada Familia
programme.desc: En 1963 en Brasil, tres niños son testigos de un OVNI en su patio trasero. Un cíclope alienígena desciende y el Sr. Alberto investiga el fenómeno.

programme.title: Desde el Hombre Polilla hasta los Reptilianos: Una guía de especies alienígenas
programme.desc: Testigos de todo el mundo han tenido encuentros cercanos con razas extraterrestres, dando forma a nuestra imaginación y convirtiéndose en fenómenos culturales.

programme.title: El incidente del Lago Falcón
programme.desc: Los extraterrestres visitan la Tierra a menudo; destaca el incidente OVNI de 1967 en el lago Falcón de Canadá. Los frecuentes avistamientos en Canadá lo hacen enigmático.

programme.title: Iconos de vida silvestre

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo

programme.title: Iconos de vida silvestre

programme.title: Veracruz Casual
programme.desc: En medio de un viaje, la camioneta de Mónica Muñiz se descompone, quedando varada en algún punto de México. Al saber que su arreglo tomará varios días, decide recorrer los alrededores y llega a Tlacotalpan.

programme.title: Veracruz Casual
programme.desc: Luego de afirmar que el quedarse varada es una buena idea, Mónica Muñiz toma el transporte público para llegar a Catemaco, cuna de los brujos y tegogolos, y donde descubrirá la cultura de este pueblo mágico.

programme.title: Veracruz Casual
programme.desc: Siguiendo con su viaje, Mónica Muñiz busca una hormiga voladora que se puede comer, no sin antes recorrer un pueblo lleno de aventuras como tirolesa y pinturas rupestres.

programme.title: Veracruz Casual
programme.desc: Cerca de su destino anterior, Mónica Muñiz llega a Coscomatepec, población de excelentes artesanos en talabartería y telares. Sin embargo, su verdadero reto será tratar de subir el pico de Orizaba.

programme.title: Veracruz Casual
programme.desc: A unas horas de Misantla se encuentra Naolinco, donde la atracción principal no solo es la cascada del mismo nombre, sino su fiesta de Día de Muertos. Así, Mónica Muñiz vive en carne propia la tradición entre cantos, comida y bebida.

programme.title: Veracruz Casual

programme.title: Veracruz Casual

programme.title: Veracruz Casual

programme.desc: A pirate ship made from a converted school bus; an old-fashioned traditional Christmas with a Christmas village; judge Taniya Nayak decides the winner.

programme.title: The Great Christmas Light Fight
programme.desc: A light show featuring over 100 3D-printed snowflakes; a 30-foot mega tree in Palmetto, Fla.; an elaborate walkthrough display experience set on almost four acres.

programme.title: The Great Christmas Light Fight
programme.desc: Dancing under the snow machine; driving through a display; a synchronized light show to an original song; getting down to the wire.

programme.title: The Great Christmas Light Fight
programme.desc: A surprise for the Small family when they turn on their lights; a blue-light waterfall; the Tittiger twins decorate for their parents; a massive display for a desert home.

programme.title: The Great Christmas Light Fight
programme.desc: A Mardi Gras Christmas for the Plauche family; the Yangello family wows with rooftop caroling; the Baughman family's idea of the true meaning of the holiday.

programme.title: For Your Eyes Only
programme.desc: Roger Moore as the formidable James Bond takes on the dangerous task of locating a top secret device that lies precariously in the waters off the beautiful Greek coast in this breathtaking action thriller.

programme.title: Octopussy
programme.desc: Roger Moore as James Bond is lured to the Indian palace of Octopussy (Maud Adams) where he learns of a plot by a diabolical villain (Louis Jourdan) that could destroy the world.

programme.title: A View to a Kill
programme.desc: Roger Moore is the enigmatic 007 in this stunt-laden adventure that pits Bond against a twisted German industrialist (Christopher Walken) and his sexy partner-in-crime (Grace Jones).

programme.title: The Living Daylights
programme.desc: This thrilling, lightning-paced adventure has the indestructible James Bond (Timothy Dalton), armed with his razor-sharp instincts and license to kill, battling diabolical arms merchants and chasing the gorgeous Maryam d'Abo.

programme.title: Licence to Kill
programme.desc: James Bond catapults into his most passionate adventure -- not for country, not for justice, but for personal revenge. Timothy Dalton brings urgency, charm and deadly determination to his role as 007.

programme.title: Goldeneye
programme.desc: Pierce Brosnan ignites the screen as James Bond in this explosive, thrill-packed adventure that pits him against a vengeful adversary who controls an awesome space weapon capable of global destruction.

programme.title: GoldenEye: el regreso del agente 007
programme.desc: James Bond vuelve con una nueva y emocionante aventura, repleta de acciones impresionantes, escenarios lujosos, bellezas femeninas y vehículos potentes. Sin embargo, esta vez se enfrenta a un adversario particularmente peligroso.

programme.title: El mañana nunca muere
programme.desc: Pierce Brosnan regresa como el valiente, astuto y devastadoramente encantador agente 007 en esta trepidante aventura.

programme.title: El mundo no basta
programme.desc: Cuando el carismático agente 007 (Pierce Brosnan) es asignado para proteger a la bella heredera de un imperio petrolero, se ve envuelto en una apasionante aventura llena de adrenalina que lo enfrenta a uno de sus peores enemigos.

programme.title: Otro día para morir
programme.desc: James Bond (Pierce Brosnan) quita el freno para llevarte por un viaje inolvidable a través del mundo y lleno de adrenalina, en esta aventura cargada de acción.

programme.title: GoldenEye: el regreso del agente 007

programme.title: El mañana nunca muere
programme.desc: Pierce Brosnan regresa como el valiente, astuto y devastadoramente encantador agente 007 en esta trepidante aventura.

programme.title: Showdown at the Grand
programme.desc: A proud movie theater owner must defend his family business from corporate developers alongside a legendary action star as art imitates life in a showdown for the ages.

programme.title: Next of Kin
programme.desc: When policeman Truman Gates' younger brother is murdered by the mob, Gates is torn between his desire to uphold the law and his lust for revenge. But Gates' older brother will not be satisfied until every member of the Chicago mob is dead.

programme.title: John Wick
programme.desc: When sadistic thugs attack John Wick (Keanu Reeves) – a brilliantly lethal ex-assassin - he hunts them down with the skill and ruthlessness that made him an underworld legend.

programme.title: John Wick 2
programme.desc: John Wick is forced out of retirement, and this time, he must face off against a shadowy international assassins' guild and more of the world's deadliest killers.

programme.title: John Wick: Chapter 3 - Parabellum
programme.desc: John Wick is on the run after killing a member of the international assassins' guild, and with a $14 million price tag on his head, he is the target of hit men and women everywhere.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt, a secret agent, is framed for the deaths of his espionage team and attempts to flee government assassins after him. He races against the clock in order to discover the truth.

programme.title: Animals Like Us
programme.desc: Altruism, an act that bestows a benefit on the recipient while conferring a cost to the actor, is one of the central paradoxes of evolution.

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: Coyote and Mario explore the wilds of Ohio for snapping turtles and end up catching double dragons!

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: Coyote Peterson takes it back to prehistoric times in this dinosaur-centric episode.

programme.title: Blue Water Savages
programme.desc: The short-finned mako shark is the undisputed lord of the open sea. With its superior speed and relatively compact size

programme.title: Wild Ones
programme.desc: Wildebeest and Zebra - Africa‚Äôs most famous drifters. Hundreds of thousands of zebra live together in the Serengeti. Their distinctive eye-catching stripes are as unique as fingerprints.

programme.title: Beautiful Serengeti
programme.desc: Explore the river environment of the enormous Nile crocodiles and hippopotamus.

programme.title: Nature Shock
programme.desc: In the South Indian state of Kerala, game wardens are horror-struck: they discover multiple female dead elephants, each brutally killed in suspicious circumstances.

programme.title: Wild Animal Orphans
programme.desc: In an attempt to find a leopard in the vast desert landscape of southern Namibia, Marlice relies on the skills of Kiewiet, an expert Bushman tracker.

programme.title: Nomads of the Serengeti
programme.desc: Safari guide Jean Du Plessis is in the Serengeti witnessing the largest mass birth on the planet, where the Wildebeest migration pauses annually. As the herd heads back north toward the Mara River, crocodiles await their annual feast.

programme.title: Lemur Street
programme.desc: Tornado baby Gizmo is attacked by spoilt brat Chelsea. His inexperienced mum Amazon offers little help as he tries to keep up with the gang on his badly injured leg.

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: Join us in Grand Cayman to meet a lizard that was brought back from the brink of extinction!

programme.title: Sharks - Danger In the Sea
programme.desc: Dive beneath the waves with renowned filmmaker John Stoneman studying the world's most savage and intricate creatures. Episode 2

programme.title: Wild Assassins
programme.desc: Out of sight but never out of mind, these lethal stealthy predators are the masters of hide and seek, but once you are found there’s a very high chance you're dead.

programme.title: Frick I Love Nature
programme.desc: Deception. David Blaine does it, and animals have mastered it. But what are some of the most bewildering ways nature deceives? To find out, Gordie becomes a bodybuilder, learns about tricky beetles and cuttlefish that aren't fish.

programme.title: Wild Assassins
programme.desc: Masters of the sky, these airborne assassins come in all shapes and sizes. Armed with razor-sharp beaks and mighty talons, Falcons and Eagles are some of the world's most aggressive and highly adept aerial hunters.

programme.title: Congo - River of No Return
programme.desc: The Congo, mighty and deep like no other river - yet still a retreat and a habitat for several of our world's strangest animals.

programme.title: Uncaged
programme.desc: Penguins dive deep into the freezing waters in search of a fishy meal as they avoid the jaws of a deadly leopard seal.

programme.title: Shark Dive TV
programme.desc: Shark Dive TV goes on a hunt for Megalodon Shark teeth and takes a Deeper Dive with Megalodon Sharks, Prickly Sharks, and Sand Tiger Sharks.

programme.title: Wild Asia
programme.desc: A year in the life of the temperate forest of Japan, where animals and plants must adapt to suit the variations of the climate in order to survive.

programme.title: Wild Life: A Forest Between Two Worlds
programme.desc: From the placid wood grouse, to large herbivores like the chamois and the Spanish ibex, to dynamic predators like bears and wolves, this program chronicles life in the animal worlds of this lush and varied region.

programme.title: I Survived . . .
programme.desc: Acting as a good Samaritan to a 14-year-old boy, Danielle is shocked when the boy pulls a gun on her and forces her to drive to a secret location.

programme.title: Anglers Digest
programme.desc: Our love of Alaska, “America's Africa” is continued this season joining Mike Briggs as he hosts us at the Clover Pass Resort near Ketchikan, in beautiful Southeast Alaska.

programme.title: Anglers Digest
programme.desc: Plenty has been written, photographed, and filmed about the Florida Keys, and the epicenter of fishing activity that surrounds them.

programme.title: Anglers Digest

programme.title: Anglers Digest

programme.title: Americana Outdoors
programme.desc: Pro Clark Wendlandt and Garmin’s Amanda Masters tackle fishing the tailrace on Pickwick Lake, just outside of Florence, Alabama; and then we have coverage of the Collegiate Bass Fishing Championship.

programme.desc: Walking the banks of a pond is something many of us have done, and in this case we're in Kentucky wetting a line for anything that bites! Then we head over to Oklahoma where Jeff Reynolds shares insight on how to catch largemounth bass.

programme.title: Americana Outdoors
programme.desc: Jeff Reynolds and Terry McWilliams from Secret Lures have teamed up for a day of fishing the 'Stupid Tube' in Kentucky. Then, we head over to Fayette County Lake with Mike McClelland who answers common questions when it comes to crank bait fishing.

programme.title: Americana Outdoors
programme.desc: We hit the waters on Choke Canyon with Wade Middleton and Jeff Kriet for a lesson in being patient when bass fishing. Then we learn more about a wide range of products for bass fishing anglers such as new trolling motors, baits, lines and more.

programme.title: Fishing Impossible
programme.desc: The boys head to Iceland in search of the Atlantic Wolfish. These terrifying-looking, deep-sea monsters are the ultimate anti-heroes, keeping the entire marine ecosystem from collapsing.

programme.title: Fishing Impossible

programme.title: I Was Prey
programme.desc: A woman is attacked by a black bear, and a man encounters a crocodile.

programme.title: I Was Prey
programme.desc: A hiker is attacked by a moose, and something drags a man underwater.

programme.title: Gator Boys
programme.desc: Paul gives a triple-amputee the chance to wrestle an alligator.

programme.title: Gator Boys
programme.desc: Paul and Jimmy face off with a water moccasin and a 6-foot rattlesnake.

programme.title: Fatal Attractions
programme.desc: Chimpanzees, our closest animal relative, possess six times the strength of an average adult male and have the temperament of a five-year-old child. Despite their strength and their wild tendencies, some people believe chimps make loving companions.

programme.title: Fatal Attractions
programme.desc: In 2003, a 500-pound tiger was removed from a New York apartment in the notorious projects of Harlem. Veteran's tigers help him cope with his post-traumatic stress disorder, but another tragic story reminds us that predators can never be denied.

programme.title: Fatal Attractions
programme.desc: Anita Finch, a 33-year-old Californian woman was found dead in her trailer-park home, clutching a note with words, "Northfield Hospital, ask for ICU." How did her passion for nature develop into an obsession for venomous snakes?

programme.title: RiffTrax: Fist of Fury

programme.title: RiffTrax: Christmas with RiffTrax featuring Magic Christmas Tree
programme.desc: Join your hosts, Mike Nelson, Kevin Murphy, and Bill Corbett, as they exchange gifts, with vintage toy commercials. Magic Christmas Tree is a fresh slice of holiday weird, sure to bring back cherished childhood memories.

programme.title: RiffTrax: Santa and the Ice Cream Bunny
programme.desc: What is an Ice Cream Bunny? We're not quite sure, and the movie doesn't really bother to explain. Evidently he has a fire truck with an air raid siren, and lives at a place called Pirates World.

programme.title: RiffTrax: I Believe In Santa Claus
programme.desc: In this cheesy Christmas classic, Santa Claus goes on a covert mission to rescue hostages with the aid of a fairy princess. This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from MST3K.

programme.title: RiffTrax Live: Santa And Ice Cream Bunny
programme.desc: One of the strangest, most baffling Christmas movies ever made, this movie defies logic, reason, and the laws of physics. This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from MST3K.

programme.title: RiffTrax Live: Santa Claus
programme.desc: From the strange and ridiculously colorful world of K. Gordon Murray comes the 1959 Holiday classic Santa Claus. This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin, and Bill from MST3K.

programme.title: RiffTrax Short: A Visit to Santa
programme.desc: Just in time for the holidays, RiffTrax presents our take on A Visit to Santa, a Christmas short of unknown origin that most probably was the result of Santa's short-lived collaboration with the producing team of Screwtape and Wormwood.

programme.title: RiffTrax Shorts: The Shoemaker and the Elves
programme.desc: The elderly shoemaker and his wife are puppets in a little puppet village, where everything looks like it was made of damp papier-mâché that was already used for something else. This short is a parody and contains a comedic commentary by RiffTrax.

programme.title: RiffTrax: The RiffTrax Yule Log
programme.desc: We're proud to present a new kind of fireplace video, one filled with festive comedy and music to be enjoyed by all! This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from MST3K.

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis

programme.desc: To prove that he is an inventor like Tails, Knuckles challenges Tails to participate in the local robot battle./ Dr. Eggman's particle accelerator has been stolen, and all evidence points to Sonic.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Young + Pregnant
programme.desc: Brianna prepares to move to Oregon with her new boyfriend Robert, Kayla urges Stephan to mend fences with her mom, and Lexi puts her foot down and stands up to Kyler.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Young + Pregnant
programme.desc: Tensions arise when Ashley gets a restraining order against Bar's mom, Lexi struggles to prove her independence, and Jade does her best to cut Sean out of her life.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Young + Pregnant
programme.desc: Stephan is ordered to pay Kayla child support, Ashley tries to be supportive of Bar's family while his brother is on trial, and Lexi pushes Kyler to be more responsible.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Young + Pregnant
programme.desc: Ashley considers a fresh start, Lexi pursues her dream job, Kayla deals with Stephan's violent outburst, Brianna regrets her family's move, and Jade celebrates her birthday.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Young + Pregnant
programme.desc: Ashley sits down with Bar's mom, Jade and Sean come together when Kloie gets sick, Kyler makes a bet with Lexi, Kayla faces a big decision, and Brianna and her mother clash.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Young + Pregnant
programme.desc: Ashley's peace with Bar's mom is short lived, Brianna second guesses her relationship, Kayla makes plans for the future, Lexi's caught in the middle, and Sean helps Jade out.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Young + Pregnant
programme.desc: Lexi's parents confront her about their problems with Kyler, Ashley and Bar take some space from each other, and Brianna struggles to make up her mind about Robert.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Young + Pregnant
programme.desc: Brianna asks Robert to move back home, Jade makes Sean take a drug test, and Ashley picks up the pieces after a fight with Bar turns physical.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Young + Pregnant
programme.desc: Ashley has a hard time accepting Bar's apology, Lexi's parents leave Kyler out of a family camping trip, and Kayla's plan to move in with a friend hit a snag.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Young + Pregnant
programme.desc: Brianna ends her relationship with Robert, Lexi visits a friend in college, Ashley moves back in with her mom, and Jade begins paying for Sean's treatment.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Young + Pregnant
programme.desc: Ashley asks Bar to stay away from Holly's birthday party, Brianna sets her sights on college, Kayla gets mixed messages from Stephan, and Jade reaches her breaking point.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Young + Pregnant
programme.desc: Ashley reconnects with Bar (despite her family's objections), Brianna tackles her issues in therapy, and Kyler is reluctant to invite his mom to Tobias's birthday.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Young + Pregnant
programme.desc: The girls look back at the biggest moments of what they went through as they were becoming young moms, and dig into fan comments from every step of their journey. Plus, the moms share their favorite unseen moments and reveal sneak peaks.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Young + Pregnant
programme.desc: Brianna and Danae confront each other for the first time since breaking up, Kayla disputes the show's depiction of her relationships, and Lexi and Kyler give a status update.
